# Revive Exterior Cleaning Solutions

> Professional exterior cleaning and property maintenance services in Swansea & South Wales, UK. AI-powered instant quoting system with automated estimates.

## About
Revive Exterior Cleaning Solutions is a professional exterior property services company based in Swansea, South Wales. We serve the SA1-SA6 postcode areas and surrounding regions. Fully insured and experienced team using professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly cleaning solutions. We handle residential and commercial properties — no job too big or too small.

## Cleaning Services (with typical price ranges in GBP)
- Driveway & Patio Cleaning (pressure washing): £100-£500
- Roof Cleaning (soft wash): £150-£750
- Gutter Cleaning & Repairs: £80-£280
- Soft Washing (render, walls, conservatories): £200-£1,000
- Render & Cladding Cleaning: £250-£1,200
- Window Cleaning: £60-£250
- Solar Panel Cleaning: £100-£400
- Conservatory Cleaning: Prices vary — get a quote
- Decking Cleaning: Prices vary — get a quote
- Astro Turf Cleaning: Prices vary — get a quote

## Additional Services
- UPVC & Gutter Repairs (bracket fixes, full replacements, general repairs)
- Garden Maintenance (grass cutting, hedge cutting, weed treatments, green waste removal)
- Fencing (installation, repairs, replacement)
- Decking (installation, cleaning, restoration)
- Astro Turf (installation, cleaning, maintenance)
- Exterior Painting (walls, fences, sheds, gates)
- Custom Cat Porches (bespoke builds to keep cats safe outdoors)
- Christmas Light Installation (supply and fit)
- Exterior Lighting Installation (plug and play systems)

## Pricing Notes
- Prices vary based on property size (small, medium, large)
- First-time cleaning may cost 20% more due to heavier buildup
- Difficult access properties may cost 25% more
- Book 3 or more services together and receive a 10% multi-service discount
- All quotes are free and no-obligation

## Service Area
Swansea, South Wales, United Kingdom
Postcodes: SA1, SA2, SA3, SA4, SA5, SA6 and surrounding areas

## Technology
Revive is an AI-integrated exterior cleaning business:
- AI-powered instant quote estimation system providing accurate price ranges in seconds
- Automated email and WhatsApp communications for confirmations, estimates, and follow-ups
- AI chat assistant on the website for customer enquiries and guided quoting
- Automated lead scoring and qualification
- Digital invoicing and job management system

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is soft washing?
A: Soft washing uses low-pressure water combined with specialist biodegradable cleaning solutions. It's ideal for delicate surfaces like render, roofs, and painted surfaces where high pressure could cause damage. It kills algae, moss, and bacteria at the root.

Q: Is pressure washing safe for my property?
A: Pressure washing is safe and ideal for hard surfaces like driveways, patios, and block paving. For softer surfaces like render, roofing tiles, and painted surfaces, we use soft washing instead to avoid any damage.

Q: How long does the cleaning take?
A: It depends on the job. A typical driveway takes 2-4 hours, a roof clean 4-6 hours, and gutter cleaning 1-3 hours. We'll give you a more accurate timeframe when we quote.

Q: How often should I have my property cleaned?
A: We recommend roof cleaning every 3-5 years, driveway and patio cleaning every 1-2 years, and gutter cleaning annually. Regular maintenance keeps your property looking great and prevents long-term damage.

Q: Do you offer guarantees?
A: Yes, we stand behind our work. If you're not satisfied, we'll come back and make it right.

Q: What areas do you cover?
A: We're based in Swansea and cover South Wales, including postcodes SA1 through SA6 and surrounding areas.

Q: Do I need to be home?
A: For most exterior cleaning jobs, you don't need to be home as long as we can access the areas being cleaned. For installations and larger projects, we'll arrange access details when booking.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept bank transfer and card payments. Payment is due upon completion of the work.
